supply_context.read: TIGHT — high runs + drawing product stocks support cracks

retail_control_group.note: Retail control group (ex autos/gas/building/food-services) +0.75% MoM / 6.4% YoY — the hard core-retail read that feeds GDP; confirms consumer resilience.

profit_margin_cycle.read: EXPANDING — profits outrunning labor costs (margin tailwind)
profit_margin_cycle.note: aggregate corporate profits vs unit labor costs — margins compress late-cycle; expanding margins argue against imminent earnings recession
